_note: Example Gazette notice fixture. Use this schema when manually curating data from a Gazette notice for use with sources/gazette.js ingestFromFixture(). This file is not read automatically — pass the parsed object to ingestFromFixture() explicitly. All fields should be copied verbatim from the official Gazette notice. Do not estimate or guess any field.
notice_text_excerpt: Notice is hereby given that Jane Smith of Smith & Associates was appointed as administrator of Home Furnishing Direct Ltd (Company Number 09876543) on 25 April 2026.
